posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: Trading in Indian markets — As you said new to options just dont go for anything else start from here: zerodha.com Introduction to Options Trading [Watch Video] Basics Watch video introduction to options - what options are, right vs obligation, call and put basics, option buyer vs seller, and how options differ from futures. Est. reading time: 1 minute

posts.author: AlwaysPlayBig
posts.text: Trading in Indian markets — Hey everyone, I understand equity trading a bit, but I’m new to options. I want to learn options trading properly from scratch, not through random tips. Where should I start : basics, Greeks, IV, strategies, risk management, paper trading? Also, for Indian markets, if you were starting today, would you choose equity/futures trading or options trading? And how are they different in terms of leverage, risk, and holding period?
